queries.question: Show science labs and art studios with computers.
queries.sql:
SELECT Science_Lab.name
FROM Science_Lab
WHERE Science_Lab.Available_Resources = "Computers"
UNION
SELECT Art_Studio.name
FROM Art_Studio
WHERE Art_Studio.Available_Resources = "Computers"
